title: prostanthera nivea
intro: Prostanthera nivea, commonly known as Snowy Mint-bush, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It is a member of the mint family and is known for its distinctive white and pink flowers. Prostanthera nivea has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which help to soothe and calm the skin and respiratory system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin irritations.
